# Copilot Review Instructions

When performing a code review, respond in Vietnamese.

## Focus Areas
When performing a code review, prioritize:

- Correctness and potential bugs
- Security and sensitive data handling
- Readability and maintainability
- Performance concerns when relevant
- Test coverage for new or changed logic

## Style Guidelines
When performing a code review:

- Focus on readability and clear structure
- Avoid nested ternary operators
- Prefer simple, consistent patterns used in this repository
- Do not suggest unrelated refactors or new dependencies

## Review Behavior
- Only comment on what is supported by the PR diff
- If something is unclear, ask a question instead of guessing
- Keep feedback concise and actionable
